ddls:
CREATE TABLE "disease_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the case was reported */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease */,
  "case_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case type */,
  "variable" TEXT /* Type of case (e.g., New Case/s (Suspected), New Case/s (Probable), New case/s (confirmed), Total suspected cases, Total probable cases) */,
  "national" INTEGER /* National total for the case type */,
  "bomi_county" INTEGER /* Bomi County total for the case type */,
  "bong_county" INTEGER /* Bong County total for the case type */,
  "gbarpolu_county" INTEGER /* Gbarpolu County total for the case type */,
  "grand_bassa" INTEGER /* Grand Bassa total for the case type */,
  "grand_cape_mount" INTEGER /* Grand Cape Mount total for the case type */,
  "grand_gedeh" INTEGER /* Grand Gedeh total for the case type */,
  "grand_kru" INTEGER /* Grand Kru total for the case type */,
  "lofa_county" INTEGER /* Lofa County total for the case type */,
  "margibi_county" INTEGER /* Margibi County total for the case type */,
  "maryland_county" INTEGER /* Maryland County total for the case type */,
  "montserrado_county" INTEGER /* Montserrado County total for the case type */,
  "nimba_county" INTEGER /* Nimba County total for the case type */,
  "river_gee_county" INTEGER /* River Gee County total for the case type */,
  "rivercess_county" INTEGER /* RiverCess County total for the case type */,
  "sinoe_county" INTEGER /* Sinoe County total for the case type */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the case location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the case location */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the case data */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_cases_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES disease_types ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_cases_case_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_type_id") REFERENCES case_types ("case_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_types" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "disease_category" TEXT /* Category of the disease (e.g., infectious, non-infectious) */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of disease transmission (e.g., air-borne, water-borne, vector-borne) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_types" (
  "case_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case type */,
  "case_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the case type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the case type */,
  "case_category" TEXT /* Category of the case type (e.g., suspected, probable, confirmed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the county belongs to */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the county location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the county location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the region location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the region location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, healthcare professional) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the access event */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser, device, etc.) of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_disease" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship between the case and disease (e.g., diagnosed, suspected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id", "disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_type_disease" (
  "case_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case type */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship between the case type and disease (e.g., associated, not associated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_type_id", "disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_region" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship between the county and region (e.g., part of, not part of) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id", "region_id")
)
